Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.title: Look for the helpers
item.description: https://youtu.be/lhwS06U1SnA Pres Trauma forced the cancellation of a show, in which high school students who competed for the privilege would perform with the military orchestra nicknamed "the presidents own." Because of their skin. But fuck that. And fuck anyone who would degrade these kids. So 60 Minutes, the group that was working with the military band prior and a group of military veterans who served in that band, all got together and put those kids where they belong. On stage for the world to see. This is just one of the many ways the cunts want to erode society, and chipping away at the happiness of innocent kids is an easy choice for them.
item.dc:creator: TalkingSnake

item.title: Orange Juice Futures Crashing since Trump Took Office
item.description: Thing I just noticed... Orange Juice futures (OJ=F) are down 46% since Trump took office. Showing the last 5 yrs, there's a dramatic decline once Trump started. Just kind of funny. https://finance.yahoo.com/chart/OJ%3DF

item.dc:creator: bohund

item.title: Isobel Thorm (Baldur’s Gate 3) Cosplay Progress: Makeup and Wig Test
item.description: So happy with how the makeup turned out!! I need to chop off about another inch off the wig and then we’ll be set. Turns out I just love silver haired girlies with dark eyeliner lol. Her face is a bit puffier than mine so I look most like her if I do this pout/smirk situation lol. I also added a lot of light concealer on the front of my cheeks and did a lower than normal contour to try to add volume/shape; also overlined my lips. Her eyeliner design was annoying but fun to do; I’m glad her hair goes over one eye as it helped hide any imperfections between the two designs. Contacts are Night Veil Velvet Gray by Honeycolor; circlet was 3D printed by me on an Elegoo Saturn 3, STL by RaisinCosplay. Half elf ears (which aren’t very visible in these shots oops) are by Aradani Studios. Silly side by side comparison pic with the character at the end for reference! EDIT: grammar/typos
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay

item.title: From a business perspective, it does make a lot of sense
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: Thank you, Carl....
item.description: I was in Ithaca today while my nephew replaced the screen on my wife's laptop. While I was there I did something I've wanted to do for years and paid my respects at Carl Sagan's grave. My love of science and astronomy is a direct result of watching Cosmos with my father when it was first broadcast on PBS.
item.dc:creator: AdmiralJohn

item.title: Love knows no language barrier
item.description: Many years ago when I was in school (about 20-25 years back) I knew a guy who shared a story about a deaf girl he was dating. He saw her using sign language at a cafe or similar location, and in an effort to be friendly sat down across from her and signed "hello" to her. She got super excited at encountering someone else who spoke sign language and started rapidly talking at him with it. He had to stop her and explain by writing on napkins that he only knew a few words of sign language. She was embarrassed, but they managed to have a nice conversation in writing. The stayed in touch and started dating and I think he started learning more sign language so they didn't need to communicate via written notes. One of the stories that stood out the most to me was how he would talk to over the phone. Apparently back then there was a phone service of some kind that allowed people to call a deaf person and a third party operator would transcribe any spoken message to text or something the deaf person's phone could display. The operator would also read the deaf person's reply to the person on the other end. (This was back before texting was as easy as it is now. Many services at the time still charged you a few cents per text, and many cell phones at the time had keypads that were hard to write long messages on.) Well, one time he was talking to her on the phone like this and the operator (female) switched out with a male operator for a break during the conversation without saying anything. So this guy was used to hearing his girlfriend's messages read to him in a female voice. Then suddenly he hears he message read to him in a dude's voice and was taken-aback by both the unexpected change and hearing certain things being said to him by a guy. But everyone was able to laugh after the confusion was cleared up. That story just stood out as one of the more interesting stories of a couple dating.
item.dc:creator: Othagovna

item.title: Make them unwelcome.

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: It's a feature
item.description: Edit for those not getting it. : This is a reference to the Fallout games made by Bathesda games and the TV show inspired by them. The game publisher is famous for releasing fun games that are just riddled with glitches. To the point where users will mod and patch games to make playable. So comment is saying TV show needed glitches to be true to the games. Which is a rather painfully accurate. Also, you don't need to have played the games to enjoy the show. Highly recommend.
item.dc:creator: EnduserisaJerk

item.title: How I became an Elf for a Lord of The Rings Orchestral concert - YuzuPyon
item.description: Full Video : https://youtu.be/7mP4jczqMGc Showing you how to turn yourself into an Elf today! this is a look I came up with to attend a Lord of the Rings Orchestral Concert, and yes I ended up crying so much it was so beautiful! Hope you enjoy the video, check out the full video if you want the longer version with more details about the look and products! Let me know what you'd like to see from me next! Wishing you a great day :) Yuzu
item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.dc:creator: EnduserisaJerk

item.title: As a current Service Member who is a minority, what’s the motivation in serving?
item.description: As a minority currently serving in the armed forces, what’s the motivation of serving? How can I be sure that if I die in combat under this administration I will receive the honors and recognition by this administration because of my skin color? Will I be considered a DEI hire and have my honor and ability to do my job questioned by the Press Secretary and Fox News, and I am not alive to defend it? Will my family be harassed by MAGA while they try to mourn? Will I be allowed to be buried in Arlington if I choose? Will I get a dignified transfer home? Will my family get a folded flag? Will my name be added to registry/memorial page? Will I be posthumously awarded the awards I could earn at the time of my death? These may seem like stupid questions, and no service member should have to ask them, but this administration has shown they can always lower the bar farther. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cz03gjnxe25o
item.dc:creator: wisco97
